summary: Step 5 Scheduled Bulk Requests testing completed. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Scheduled Requests page loads correctly with navigation link, schedule cards display with all actions (History, Run Now, Edit, Enable/Disable), Create Schedule dialog has all required fields, Run History dialog shows all metrics (matched_employees, created_requests, skipped_duplicates, skipped_ineligible). APScheduler is running (confirmed in backend logs).

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

seed_data_creation: Created test schedule 'TEST_Training Renewal Reminders' during testing (disabled after test). Existing schedule 'DBS Renewal Reminders' (ID: 89656468-511e-4cec-a614-0ac47588c124) used for run tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 5 Scheduled Bulk Requests fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: (1) POST /api/bulk/schedules creates schedule with all fields (name, description, target_type, trigger_type, days_before_expiry, target_rules, request_payload), (2) GET /api/bulk/schedules lists all schedules with include_disabled option, (3) GET /api/bulk/schedules/{id} returns specific schedule, (4) PUT /api/bulk/schedules/{id} updates schedule definition, (5) POST /api/bulk/schedules/{id}/enable enables disabled schedule, (6) POST /api/bulk/schedules/{id}/disable disables schedule without deleting history, (7) POST /api/bulk/schedules/{id}/run-now manually triggers schedule run with full metrics, (8) GET /api/bulk/schedules/{id}/history shows run history with matched_employees, created_requests, skipped_duplicates, skipped_ineligible, errors, (9) POST /api/bulk/schedules/run-all-due runs all due schedules (catch-up), (10) GET /api/bulk/requests/attributed shows requests with source attribution (manual vs scheduled), (11) APScheduler runs every hour at :15 with misfire_grace_time=3600, (12) Frontend ScheduledRequestsPage.js loads with navigation link in sidebar, (13) Schedule cards show last run info and all action buttons, (14) Create Schedule dialog has all required fields, (15) Run History dialog shows all metrics. Test employees have no items expiring within 60 days so runs show skipped_ineligible=2.

schedule_run_now.details: POST /api/bulk/schedules/{id}/run-now triggers manual run with full metrics

run_all_due_schedules.details: POST /api/bulk/schedules/run-all-due runs all due schedules with catch-up

source_attribution.details: GET /api/bulk/requests/attributed filters by source (manual/scheduled) and schedule_id

deduplication.details: Running schedule twice skips duplicates correctly

input_validation.details: Missing name, short name, invalid target_type all return 422

apscheduler_running.details: Backend logs confirm APScheduler started for scheduled bulk requests

frontend_page_load.details: Scheduled Requests page loads with data-testid='scheduled-requests-page'

frontend_schedule_cards.details: Schedule cards show name, status badge, days before expiry, last run info, all action buttons

frontend_create_dialog.details: Create Schedule dialog has all required fields: name, description, target_type, days_before_expiry, due_days, custom_message, is_enabled

frontend_history_dialog.details: Run History dialog shows all metrics: Employees, Sent, Duplicates, Not Due
